info.title: Flipdish API - Apps
info.description: Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Apps operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

HasAndroidApp.description: Has Android app in Google Play Store. This is readonly.

Languages.description: Languages that have been selected to be available to customers.

AvailableAppLanguages.description: Lists all languages that are supported by Flipdish.

AppAccessLevel.description: App access level for the logged in user

AppResourceSet.description: Constitutes a list of available resources

Features.description: Feature flags. These cannot be set by 3rd parties.

GoogleMapsApiKeyWeb.description: Key to be passed with Google Maps requests

Name.description:
App name. 
This is used in various places on the Apple App Store, Google Play Store, mobile apps and websites.

HostName.description: HostName on which the web-ordering system is allowed to be hosted or that a Flipdish website is hosted on.

MainColor.description: Main color of the web / Android / iOS applications

KioskPrimaryColour.description: Primary colour used on the Kiosk

IsPanaceaEnabled.description:
Panacea is the term used for websites that are hosted on the my.flipdish.com domain. This value is true when the App's website is hosted on this domain.
The alternative to using Panacea websites is to use a custom domain.

PanaceaVanityUrl.description: In case of IsPanaceaEnabled is true, the app can be accessed via https://my.flipdish.com/{PanaceaVanityUrl}

CountryId.description:
Country identifier in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format. 
This code is set automatically based on the locations of the Stores in the App. 

The App Country is used 
 - to determine how to parse mobile phone numbers that are entered in their local numbering format
 - to determine if country specific payment methods should be offered
 - in various fraud checks

AppChannelAssignment.description:
Describes a ChannelAssignment which is 
when a AppId is assigned to a Sales Channel

ChannelId.description: Id of the channel on the assignment

ComplianceType.description:
Type of compliance.
This controls if the Flipdish websites and apps display cookie consent banners and adjust cookies to be inline with various regulations. 
You should set this correctly based on your region.

AllowDisablingOfGdpr.description: For EU countries, we should not allow to change the option to “Default banner”, but all other countries should be able to do so.

EmailRequestMode.description: Display a popup to users requesting their email address

WebToAppRedirect.description: Sends users to their native apps or request them to install the pwa

AddressEntryType.description: Address entry type - TextEntryManualDisallowed is the only supported configuration

Name.description:
App name. 
This is used in various places on the Apple App Store, Google Play Store, mobile apps and websites.

HostName.description: HostName on which the web-ordering system is allowed to be hosted or that a Flipdish website is hosted on.

MainColor.description: Main color of the web / Android / iOS applications

KioskPrimaryColour.description: Primary colour used on the Kiosk

IsPanaceaEnabled.description:
Panacea is the term used for websites that are hosted on the my.flipdish.com domain. This value is true when the App's website is hosted on this domain.
The alternative to using Panacea websites is to use a custom domain.

PanaceaVanityUrl.description: In case of IsPanaceaEnabled is true, the app can be accessed via https://my.flipdish.com/{PanaceaVanityUrl}

Country identifier in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

 - to determine how to parse mobile phone numbers that are entered in their local numbering format
 - to determine if country specific payment methods should be offered

ContactFormType.description:
Contact form type
None = 0,
Email = 1,
Intercom = 2,
WebView = 3,
FlipdishMessages = 4

ReadyToPublishToAppStore.description: Ready to publish to app store

MaintainedExternally.description: Channel is Maintained Externally or not

CreateAppParameters.description: The parameters required to create a new app.

Name.description: The name of the brand that this app/white-label represents.

DnsRecordInformation.description: Holds the information for the A and CNAME Records of a domain.

IsCNameReady.description: indicates whether the CNAME record is ready or not.

IsAReady.description: indicates whether the A record is ready or not.

IsApiCNameReady.description: indicates whether the API CNAME record is ready or not.

FlipdishError.description: Standard Flipdish API error response. Errors are returned as a JSON object with a human-readable message and a programmatic error code (see https://developers.flipdish.com/docs/error-handling).

errorCode.description: Unique identifier for programmatic error handling.

details.description: Additional context returned in non-production environments.

Enabled.description: Is the language enabled for use.

StoreChannelAssignment.description: Represents a store that is assigned to a Sales Channel

Name.description: Nice display name for a country

OtpNumber.description: The phone number provided to Store staff which, in conjunction with a one-time-code, will connect them to the customer.

SupportNumber.description: The store's support phone number, displayed to customers.

AddressLayout.description: Address layout format. This changes the layout of address entry forms on the web app, iOS and Android app and should be set based on local custom.

SupportRegion.description: Supported region. This is not used.

ImageId.description: Represents the id of the image

ImageLocation.description: Represents the location of the image

DisplayFreeCokeSideMenuItem.description: Display free coke side menu item

DisplayCuisineTypeListAndRestaurantSearc.description: Display cuisine type list and restaurant search bar

DisplayFooterLinksToOtherSites.description: Display footer links to other sites

HideAppConfigFromAdminList.description: Hide app config from admin list

DisplayTipOptionToUsersByDefault.description: Display tip option to users by default

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Implicit grant for first-party portal apps; client credentials grant for server-to-server App Store apps (exchange Client ID + Secret Key for a bearer access token).
